title: Polyboea corensis
taxonomy: Polyboea corensis is classified as a species of ant-mimicking jumping spider. The genus Polyboea is part of the family Salticidae. It belongs to the infraorder Araneomorphae, a suborder of spiders. The infraorder Araneomorphae is within the order Araneomorphae, which is a subgroup of arachnids. Polyboea corensis can be further classified within the kingdom Animalia.
